revision.comment: Bot: create category from JA/Wikidata
revision.text:
[[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[Category:Tier 3 Categories]][[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[ja:Category:長瀞町の建築物]]
This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[Hodosan Shrine]].

revision.comment: Bot: append metadata & Tier-2 tag
revision.text:
[[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[Category:Tier 3 Categories]][[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[ja:Category:長瀞町の建築物]]
This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[Hodosan Shrine]]. [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]]

revision.comment: Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page & cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page & cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - "{{DEFAULTSORT:" to "[[Category:Categories to be renamed]]{{citation needed|"
Immanuelle moved page [[Category:長瀞町の建築物]] to [[Category:Architecture of Nagatoro Town]]: Merge [[Category:長瀞町の建築物]] into [[Category:Architecture of Nagatoro Town]] via bot
Removing from [[Category:Categories to be renamed]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on "
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "↵.↵" to ""
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Bot: replace with clean JA/Local structure
revision.text:
==Japanese Content== [[埼玉県]][[秩父郡]][[長瀞町]]の建築物に関するカテゴリ。 {{DEFAULTSORT:なかとろまち}} {{座標一覧}} [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]]
==Local Content== {{citation needed|なかとろまち}} {{座標一覧}} {{translated page|ja|Category:長瀞町の建築物|version=99443926}} [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Tier 3 Categories]] [[ja:Category:長瀞町の建築物]] [[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on Hodosan Shrine]] [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{DEFAULTSORT:" to "{{citation needed|"
revision.text:
==Japanese Content== [[埼玉県]][[秩父郡]][[長瀞町]]の建築物に関するカテゴリ。 {{citation needed|なかとろまち}} {{座標一覧}} [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]]

revision.comment: Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "[[ja:" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]][[ja:"
Text replacement - "[[ja:" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]][[Ja:"

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "[[Category:categories missing wikidata]]" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]]"
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Text replacement - "[[Ja:" to "[[ja:"
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q138026614)
Text replacement - "ategories missing wikidata" to "qq"
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: remove [[Category:Cqq]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Cqq but with jawiki]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] (crud category cleanup)
Removing from [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text:
<!--templates-->
{{citation needed|なかとろまち}}
{{座標一覧}}
{{translated page|ja|Category:長瀞町の建築物|version=99443926}}
{{wikidata link|Q138026614}}
<!--interwikis-->
[[ja:Category:長瀞町の建築物]]

[[Category:sn_crud|TESTThis category was created from JA→Wikidata links on Hodosan Shrine]]
[[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]]
[[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]]
[[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]]
